title: [SVExtractTestCode] Don't Extract from Bound Instances
body:
There is currently a weird interaction between Grand Central interfaces and extract test code (that may be a symptom of a larger issue). If a Grand Central companion includes code that would be extracted, e.g., an assert, then this winds up with a doubly bound module. The Grand Central companion is bound and then the test code is bound into the companion.

While I haven't seen issues with Synopsys simulations, Cadence simulations really don't like this and complain about "Target module in a bind statement is source of another bind".

We should probably change extract test code to not extract if the module is already bound.
